seoTitle: Camden Head vs Camden Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Camden Head and Camden Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Camden Head vs Camden Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Camden Head and Camden Park.
heading: Camden Head vs Camden Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Camden Head, New South Wales and Camden Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Camden Park has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Camden Head (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Camden Head or Camden Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Camden Head has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Camden Park scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Camden Head scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Camden Park scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Camden Head or Camden Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Camden Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
